summary: Full backend+frontend regression of SwipeNoten. 14/14 pytest backend tests pass: idoceo import + idempotent re-import (0 added/21 updated/new_class=false), 1 photo present after import, classes list with student_count=21, grade-system PUT (valid + 400 on invalid), session creation w/ DD.MM.YYYY date, students sorted by order, grade upsert (no duplicates) + delete, CSV export with header 'Vorname,Nachname,<date>' and only graded rows. Frontend e2e via Playwright: dropzone visible, class card shows 'Medu2 / 21 Schüler*innen' + both grade-system pills + Bewerten button; clicking Bewerten navigates to /grade/<id>; progress goes 0/21 -> 1/21 on tap-cell ('1+'), 1/21 -> 0/21 on Undo, 0/21 -> 1/21 on upward drag of student card (framer-motion threshold honored); grading remaining students reveals data-testid=grading-done overlay with 'Zusammenfassung & Export'; navigating to /summary/<id> renders 21 summary-grade-<id> rows and export-csv-button href points to /api/sessions/<id>/export.csv. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: bson.ObjectId(class_id) is used without try/except - a malformed id will raise 500 instead of 400/404. Consider validating ObjectId and returning 400 for invalid format on /classes/{id}, /sessions/{id}, /sessions/{id}/grades.
Grade.jsx: api errors during POST grade/DELETE grade are silently swallowed (catch {}). Consider surfacing a toast or at minimum logging for diagnosability.
server.py CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' AND allow_credentials=True, which browsers reject. For a single-user local app it is fine, but worth tightening before any multi-origin deploy.
No tests/seed cleanup endpoint, so the imported 'Medu2' class persists across test runs - acceptable here because import is idempotent, but adds noise to manual DB inspection.
test_credentials: No auth required. Sample import: /app/tests/sample.idoceo, password 'test'.
seed_data_creation: Re-uses existing Medu2 class (idempotent import). One session is created per test run and graded fully; left behind for inspection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set. Frontend dropzone uses data-testid=import-dropzone, class card start button data-testid=start-round-<id>, grade cells data-testid=grade-cell-<value> (16 of them per session), drag-card data-testid=student-swipe-card. Drag must move >=70px from center to register (THRESHOLD). The /api/sessions/<id> response shape and CSV header format are stable and asserted.
